name: Accounting Link End of Life
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can transition from the deprecated Accounting Link feature to modern accounting integrations that significantly improve your financial reporting accuracy and operational efficiency. This ensures your retail operations maintain seamless synchronization with accounting systems like Xero and MYOB, helping you achieve better financial visibility and compliance while reducing manual reconciliation work."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Understanding which replacement reports to use helps ensure continuity in your financial workflows and accounting processes. When you migrate to the updated accounting reports, you can expect more reliable data tracking and improved alignment with ANZ accounting standards, ensuring your retail operations consistently support accurate financial management."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Accounting Link End of Life"}], "data-id": "accounting-link-end-of-life"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accounting Link reached End-of-Life on June 30th 2022."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Following on from this, the Accounting Link reports are scheduled to be removed from Retail Express in a future update. These reports are found under "}, {"text": "Reports > ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Accounting Link Reconciliation Reports", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To assist with the transition to a new Accounting Integration and reports, we have provided a list of replacement reports below."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on supported Accounting Integration options, please refer to the "}, {"text": "Accounting Integration Options"}, {"text": " article."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Related:"}, {"text": "Accounting Reports Overview"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accounting Link Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Updated Report", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Account Customers Reconciliation Report"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Account Receiveable Balances Report"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This report will include balances of products that have been fulfilled to Customers with Account Credit Limits and Credit Terms."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note the behaviour of managing Account Customers has changed from Accounting Link, so this report may not match the method chosen when exporting data to Accounting Link in the past."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accounting Basis Reconciliation Report"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fulfilled Sales Report"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This report "}, {"text": "provides details of items fulfilled including cost and sales information, grouped by date."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This report is only suitable if Accounting Link was configured to use Fulfilled Accrual Basis. All current Accounting Integration methods use Fulfilled Accrual Basis - other methods are not supported by the updated Accounting Reports."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Layby Reconciliation Report"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Layby Balances Report"}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Layby Movements Reports"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These reports track transactions where Payment and Fulfilment occur on different dates, irrespective of the Fulfilment method chosen in POS e.g. Delivery, Pickup, etc."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Purchasing Reconciliation Report"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Order Report"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Provides summary totals per Purchase Order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This report only includes Purchase Orders in the Complete and Available status (Incomplete, On Order or Back Order POs will not be displayed)."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-4b932258"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
